title: Find the Greek Gift
description: Take White and break open the castled king with the classical bishop sacrifice.

setup.pgn:
[Event "Greek Gift Sacrifice"]
[Result "*"]

1. e4 e6 2. d4 d5 3. Nc3 Nf6 4. e5 Nfd7 5. Nf3 Bb4 6. Bd3 O-O *

solution.pgn:
[Event "Greek Gift Solution"]
[Result "*"]

1. e4 e6 2. d4 d5 3. Nc3 Nf6 4. e5 Nfd7 5. Nf3 Bb4 6. Bd3 O-O 7. Bxh7+ Kxh7 8. Ng5+ Kg8 9. Qh5 *
solution.explanation: The bishop removes the h7 shelter, the knight arrives with check, and the queen joins on the h-file.

variants.label: Defend as Black
variants.detail: Black to move: respond to Bxh7+

setup.pgn:
[Event "Greek Gift Defense"]
[Result "*"]

1. e4 e6 2. d4 d5 3. Nc3 Nf6 4. e5 Nfd7 5. Nf3 Bb4 6. Bd3 O-O 7. Bxh7+ *

solution.pgn:
[Event "Greek Gift Defense Solution"]
[Result "*"]

1. e4 e6 2. d4 d5 3. Nc3 Nf6 4. e5 Nfd7 5. Nf3 Bb4 6. Bd3 O-O 7. Bxh7+ Kxh7 8. Ng5+ Kg8 9. Qh5 Re8 *
solution.explanation: Accept the bishop, retreat toward g8, and create an escape or defensive resource on the back rank. This position remains extremely dangerous.
